vbench.en:
WorldFoundry runs VBench from the checked-in evaluator code at `worldfoundry/evaluation/tasks/execution/runners/vbench/runtime`. The steps below follow the upstream VBench protocol for prompts, generated videos, and metric checkpoints without requiring a separate official repo checkout.

### Step 1 — Install the metric runtime

**Option A: pip (official)**

```bash
pip install torch torchvision --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu118
pip install vbench

# Required only for some full-suite dimensions:
pip install detectron2@git+https://github.com/facebookresearch/detectron2.git
```

Detectron2 supports CUDA 11.x or 12.1 only.

**WorldFoundry in-tree path (no external benchmark repo):**

```bash
# Uses worldfoundry-unified-cu128 (needs_new_env: false)
export WORLDFOUNDRY_VBENCH_CACHE_DIR=${WORLDFOUNDRY_CACHE_DIR:-cache/worldfoundry}/models/vbench
```

Runtime source: `worldfoundry/evaluation/tasks/execution/runners/vbench/runtime`

### Step 2 — Download the prompt manifest

The runner needs `VBench_full_info.json`. Download it into your benchmark asset directory or pass the path through the local asset configuration.

```bash
wget -O VBench_full_info.json \
  https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Vchitect/VBench/master/vbench/VBench_full_info.json
```

Prompt text files are under upstream `prompts/` (`prompts/prompts_per_dimension/`, `prompts/all_dimension.txt`). Sampling rules: [prompts/README.md](https://github.com/Vchitect/VBench/tree/master/prompts#how-to-sample-videos-for-evaluation).

### Step 3 — Download evaluator checkpoints (metric models)

Official default cache root: `~/.cache/vbench/` (see `pretrained/README.md`). Commands below are copied from upstream `pretrained/*/model_path.txt` and `pretrained/*/download.sh`.

```bash
mkdir -p ~/.cache/vbench/{clip_model,ViCLIP,umt_model,pyiqa_model,grit_model,caption_model,raft_model}
mkdir -p ~/.cache/amt_model
mkdir -p ~/.cache/aesthetic_model/emb_reader

# CLIP (pretrained/clip_model/model_path.txt)
wget https://openaipublic.azureedge.net/clip/models/40d365715913c9da98579312b702a82c18be219cc2a73407c4526f58eba950af/ViT-B-32.pt \
  -P ~/.cache/vbench/clip_model
wget https://openaipublic.azureedge.net/clip/models/b8cca3fd41ae0c99ba7e8951adf17d267cdb84cd88be6f7c2e0eca1737a03836/ViT-L-14.pt \
  -P ~/.cache/vbench/clip_model

# ViCLIP (pretrained/viclip_model/model_path.txt)
wget https://huggingface.co/OpenGVLab/VBench_Used_Models/resolve/main/ViClip-InternVid-10M-FLT.pth \
  -P ~/.cache/vbench/ViCLIP

# UMT (pretrained/umt_model/model_path.txt)
wget https://huggingface.co/OpenGVLab/VBench_Used_Models/resolve/main/l16_ptk710_ftk710_ftk400_f16_res224.pth \
  -P ~/.cache/vbench/umt_model/

# AMT-S (pretrained/amt_model/download.sh)
wget https://huggingface.co/lalala125/AMT/resolve/main/amt-s.pth -P ~/.cache/amt_model

# LAION aesthetic head (pretrained/aesthetic_model/model_path.txt)
curl -L --create-dirs \
  -o ~/.cache/aesthetic_model/emb_reader/sa_0_4_vit_l_14_linear.pth \
  https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LAION-AI/aesthetic-predictor/main/sa_0_4_vit_l_14_linear.pth

# MUSIQ-SPAQ (pretrained/pyiqa_model/model_path.txt)
wget https://github.com/chaofengc/IQA-PyTorch/releases/download/v0.1-weights/musiq_spaq_ckpt-358bb6af.pth \
  -P ~/.cache/vbench/pyiqa_model

# GRiT (pretrained/grit_model/model_path.txt)
wget https://huggingface.co/OpenGVLab/VBench_Used_Models/resolve/main/grit_b_densecap_objectdet.pth \
  -P ~/.cache/vbench/grit_model

# Tag2Text (pretrained/caption_model/model_path.txt)
wget https://huggingface.co/spaces/xinyu1205/recognize-anything/resolve/main/tag2text_swin_14m.pth \
  -P ~/.cache/vbench/caption_model

# RAFT (pretrained/raft_model/download.sh)
wget -P ~/.cache/vbench/raft_model/ \
  https://dl.dropboxusercontent.com/s/4j4z58wuv8o0mfz/models.zip
unzip -d ~/.cache/vbench/raft_model/ ~/.cache/vbench/raft_model/models.zip
rm -f ~/.cache/vbench/raft_model/models.zip
```

**WorldFoundry equivalent paths:** mirror the same files under `${WORLDFOUNDRY_CKPT_DIR}/VBench/...` or `${WORLDFOUNDRY_VBENCH_CACHE_DIR}` and set `WORLDFOUNDRY_VBENCH_*` overrides — see [local assets guide](/docs/guides/local-assets).

**Your T2V generator checkpoint is separate.** VBench scoring does not load your video model; generate videos first, then evaluate the output folder.

### Step 4 — Prepare generated videos (your model outputs)

From upstream [prompt sampling guide](https://github.com/Vchitect/VBench/tree/master/prompts#how-to-sample-videos-for-evaluation):

1. Read prompts from `prompts/prompts_per_dimension/{dimension}.txt` or `prompts/all_dimension.txt`.
2. Sample **5 videos per prompt** ( **`temporal_flickering`: 25 videos** ).
3. Use a different random seed per video.
4. Name files **`{prompt}-{index}.mp4`**, `index` in `0..4`.
5. Default layout: `vbench_videos/{model}/{dimension}/{prompt}-{index}.mp4`.

Export your output folder:

```bash
export WORLDFOUNDRY_GENERATED_ARTIFACT_DIR=/path/to/your/generated_videos
```

Optional upstream reference videos (not required for scoring your own outputs): [Google Drive sampled videos](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/13pH95aUN-hVgybUZJBx1e_08R6xhZs5X).

Before `temporal_flickering`, run upstream static filter:

```bash
python static_filter.py --videos_path "$WORLDFOUNDRY_GENERATED_ARTIFACT_DIR"
```

### Step 5 — Run evaluation

**Official CLI — custom-input scoring (`custom_input`, 6 supported dims):**

```bash
vbench evaluate \
  --dimension aesthetic_quality \
  --videos_path "$WORLDFOUNDRY_GENERATED_ARTIFACT_DIR" \
  --mode custom_input
```

Supported `custom_input` dimensions: `subject_consistency`, `background_consistency`, `motion_smoothness`, `dynamic_degree`, `aesthetic_quality`, `imaging_quality`.

**Official CLI — standard prompt suite (leaderboard-fair):**

```bash
vbench evaluate \
  --videos_path sampled_videos/lavie/human_action \
  --dimension human_action
```

Multi-GPU:

```bash
vbench evaluate --ngpus=8 --dimension aesthetic_quality --videos_path /path/to/videos --mode custom_input
```

**WorldFoundry runner (recommended start):**

```bash
export WORLDFOUNDRY_GENERATED_ARTIFACT_DIR=/path/to/your/generated_videos

PYTHONPATH=. ${WORLDFOUNDRY_UNIFIED_PYTHON} \
  worldfoundry/evaluation/tasks/execution/runners/vbench/run_vbench_official_runner.py run \
  --videos-path "$WORLDFOUNDRY_GENERATED_ARTIFACT_DIR" \
  --dimension aesthetic_quality \
  --mode custom_input \
  --output-dir tmp/vbench_aesthetic_start \
  --json
```
vbench.zh:
WorldFoundry 使用仓内 VBench evaluator 代码：`worldfoundry/evaluation/tasks/execution/runners/vbench/runtime`。下面的流程对齐 upstream VBench 的 prompt、生成视频与 metric checkpoint 协议，但不需要单独 clone 官方 repo。

### 步骤 1 — 安装 metric runtime

**方式 A：pip（official）**

```bash
pip install torch torchvision --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu118
pip install vbench

# 部分 full-suite 维度才需要：
pip install detectron2@git+https://github.com/facebookresearch/detectron2.git
```

Detectron2 仅支持 CUDA 11.x 或 12.1。

**WorldFoundry 仓内路径（无需外部 benchmark repo）：**

```bash
# 使用 worldfoundry-unified-cu128（needs_new_env: false）
export WORLDFOUNDRY_VBENCH_CACHE_DIR=${WORLDFOUNDRY_CACHE_DIR:-cache/worldfoundry}/models/vbench
```

Runtime 源码：`worldfoundry/evaluation/tasks/execution/runners/vbench/runtime`

### 步骤 2 — 下载 prompt manifest

Runner 需要 `VBench_full_info.json`；请下载到 benchmark asset 目录，或通过本地资产配置显式传入路径。

```bash
wget -O VBench_full_info.json \
  https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Vchitect/VBench/master/vbench/VBench_full_info.json
```

Prompt 文本在 upstream `prompts/`（`prompts/prompts_per_dimension/`、`prompts/all_dimension.txt`）。采样规则见 [prompts/README.md](https://github.com/Vchitect/VBench/tree/master/prompts#how-to-sample-videos-for-evaluation)。

### 步骤 3 — 下载 evaluator checkpoint（metric 模型）

Official 默认缓存根目录：`~/.cache/vbench/`（见 `pretrained/README.md`）。以下命令来自 upstream `pretrained/*/model_path.txt` 与 `pretrained/*/download.sh`。

```bash
mkdir -p ~/.cache/vbench/{clip_model,ViCLIP,umt_model,pyiqa_model,grit_model,caption_model,raft_model}
mkdir -p ~/.cache/amt_model
mkdir -p ~/.cache/aesthetic_model/emb_reader

# CLIP（pretrained/clip_model/model_path.txt）
wget https://openaipublic.azureedge.net/clip/models/40d365715913c9da98579312b702a82c18be219cc2a73407c4526f58eba950af/ViT-B-32.pt \
  -P ~/.cache/vbench/clip_model
wget https://openaipublic.azureedge.net/clip/models/b8cca3fd41ae0c99ba7e8951adf17d267cdb84cd88be6f7c2e0eca1737a03836/ViT-L-14.pt \
  -P ~/.cache/vbench/clip_model

# ViCLIP（pretrained/viclip_model/model_path.txt）
wget https://huggingface.co/OpenGVLab/VBench_Used_Models/resolve/main/ViClip-InternVid-10M-FLT.pth \
  -P ~/.cache/vbench/ViCLIP

# UMT（pretrained/umt_model/model_path.txt）
wget https://huggingface.co/OpenGVLab/VBench_Used_Models/resolve/main/l16_ptk710_ftk710_ftk400_f16_res224.pth \
  -P ~/.cache/vbench/umt_model/

# AMT-S（pretrained/amt_model/download.sh）
wget https://huggingface.co/lalala125/AMT/resolve/main/amt-s.pth -P ~/.cache/amt_model

# LAION aesthetic head（pretrained/aesthetic_model/model_path.txt）
curl -L --create-dirs \
  -o ~/.cache/aesthetic_model/emb_reader/sa_0_4_vit_l_14_linear.pth \
  https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LAION-AI/aesthetic-predictor/main/sa_0_4_vit_l_14_linear.pth

# MUSIQ-SPAQ（pretrained/pyiqa_model/model_path.txt）
wget https://github.com/chaofengc/IQA-PyTorch/releases/download/v0.1-weights/musiq_spaq_ckpt-358bb6af.pth \
  -P ~/.cache/vbench/pyiqa_model

# GRiT（pretrained/grit_model/model_path.txt）
wget https://huggingface.co/OpenGVLab/VBench_Used_Models/resolve/main/grit_b_densecap_objectdet.pth \
  -P ~/.cache/vbench/grit_model

# Tag2Text（pretrained/caption_model/model_path.txt）
wget https://huggingface.co/spaces/xinyu1205/recognize-anything/resolve/main/tag2text_swin_14m.pth \
  -P ~/.cache/vbench/caption_model

# RAFT（pretrained/raft_model/download.sh）
wget -P ~/.cache/vbench/raft_model/ \
  https://dl.dropboxusercontent.com/s/4j4z58wuv8o0mfz/models.zip
unzip -d ~/.cache/vbench/raft_model/ ~/.cache/vbench/raft_model/models.zip
rm -f ~/.cache/vbench/raft_model/models.zip
```

**WorldFoundry 对应路径：** 将相同文件放到 `${WORLDFOUNDRY_CKPT_DIR}/VBench/...` 或 `${WORLDFOUNDRY_VBENCH_CACHE_DIR}`，并用 `WORLDFOUNDRY_VBENCH_*` 覆盖——见 [local assets 指南](/zh/docs/guides/local-assets)。

**待测 T2V 生成模型 checkpoint 是另一套。** VBench 打分不会加载你的视频生成模型；请先生成视频，再评估输出目录。

### 步骤 4 — 准备生成视频（你的模型输出）

按 upstream [prompt 采样说明](https://github.com/Vchitect/VBench/tree/master/prompts#how-to-sample-videos-for-evaluation)：

1. 从 `prompts/prompts_per_dimension/{dimension}.txt` 或 `prompts/all_dimension.txt` 读取 prompt。
2. **每个 prompt 采 5 条视频**（**`temporal_flickering` 需 25 条**）。
3. 每条视频使用不同 random seed。
4. 命名 **`{prompt}-{index}.mp4`**，`index` 为 `0..4`。
5. 默认目录：`vbench_videos/{model}/{dimension}/{prompt}-{index}.mp4`。

导出输出目录：

```bash
export WORLDFOUNDRY_GENERATED_ARTIFACT_DIR=/path/to/your/generated_videos
```

可选 upstream 参考视频（评估自生成结果时不必需）：[Google Drive sampled videos](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/13pH95aUN-hVgybUZJBx1e_08R6xhZs5X)。

跑 `temporal_flickering` 前先执行 upstream static filter：

```bash
python static_filter.py --videos_path "$WORLDFOUNDRY_GENERATED_ARTIFACT_DIR"
```

### 步骤 5 — 运行评测

**Official CLI — custom-input scoring（`custom_input`，6 个 supported dim）：**

```bash
vbench evaluate \
  --dimension aesthetic_quality \
  --videos_path "$WORLDFOUNDRY_GENERATED_ARTIFACT_DIR" \
  --mode custom_input
```

`custom_input` 支持：`subject_consistency`、`background_consistency`、`motion_smoothness`、`dynamic_degree`、`aesthetic_quality`、`imaging_quality`。

**Official CLI — standard prompt suite（leaderboard 公平对比）：**

```bash
vbench evaluate \
  --videos_path sampled_videos/lavie/human_action \
  --dimension human_action
```

多 GPU：

```bash
vbench evaluate --ngpus=8 --dimension aesthetic_quality --videos_path /path/to/videos --mode custom_input
```

**WorldFoundry runner（建议起步命令）：**

```bash
export WORLDFOUNDRY_GENERATED_ARTIFACT_DIR=/path/to/your/generated_videos

PYTHONPATH=. ${WORLDFOUNDRY_UNIFIED_PYTHON} \
  worldfoundry/evaluation/tasks/execution/runners/vbench/run_vbench_official_runner.py run \
  --videos-path "$WORLDFOUNDRY_GENERATED_ARTIFACT_DIR" \
  --dimension aesthetic_quality \
  --mode custom_input \
  --output-dir tmp/vbench_aesthetic_start \
  --json
```
